action.reasoning: Observation: Codec augmentation worsened test EER (0.1022 vs 0.0913). Analysis: The augmentation doesn't match real codec degradation well enough. Decision: Try improved inference strategy - use full-length audio with sliding window and score averaging on the original best model. Also try training with more epochs without augmentation but with better regularization.
